  • Uses of Customer in com.runticket.service

    Method parameters in com.runticket.service with type arguments of type Customer
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    CustomerListStrategy.extractCustomerData(File fileIn, Map<String,Customer> customerList)
    Extracts customer data from a file and populates the customerList HashMap
    void
    EventListStrategy.extractCustomerData(File fileIn, Map<String,Customer> mapIn)
    Extracts customer data - not applicable for this strategy, and so it won't do anything but display a message saying that this strategy cannot extract Customer data
    void
    FileParsingContext.extractCustomerData(File fileIn, Map<String,Customer> mapIn)
    Extracts customer data from a file using the current parsing strategy
    void
    FileParsingStrategy.extractCustomerData(File fileIn, Map<String,Customer> customerMapIn)
    Extracts customer data from a file
    void
    UpdateDataStrategy.extractCustomerData(File fileIn, Map<String,Customer> mapIn)
    Won't do anything since this strategy only updates data
    List<Invoice>
    AutoPurchase.processFile(String filename, ConcurrentHashMap<String,Customer> customers, ConcurrentHashMap<Integer,Event> events)
    Reads and processes all automatic ticket purchases from CSV file.
    void
    CustomerListStrategy.updateData(Map<String,Customer> mapIn, Map<Integer,Event> eventMapIn)
    Updates customer and event data - not applicable for this strategy and so it won't do anything but display a message that says that it cannot update data.
    void
    EventListStrategy.updateData(Map<String,Customer> mapIn, Map<Integer,Event> eventMapIn)
    Updates customer and event data - not applicable for this strategy, and so it won't do anything but display a message saying that this strategy cannot update data.
    void
    FileParsingContext.updateData(Map<String,Customer> mapIn, Map<Integer,Event> eventMapIn)
    Updates data using the current parsing strategy
    void
    FileParsingStrategy.updateData(Map<String,Customer> customerMapIn, Map<Integer,Event> eventMapIn)
    Updates data to a file
    void
    UpdateDataStrategy.updateData(Map<String,Customer> customerList, Map<Integer,Event> eventList)
    Updates event and customer data to new CSV files
